diagrams.description: This mind map organizes the multidisciplinary field of Sociology around its central concept. It branches into Core Concepts (social structure, culture, socialization, inequality, institutions), Major Theoretical Perspectives (Functionalism – Durkheim, Conflict Theory – Marx, Symbolic Interactionism – Mead, Feminist Theory, Postmodernism), Research Methods (quantitative: surveys/statistics; qualitative: ethnography/interviews; mixed methods), Key Thinkers (Comte, Marx, Durkheim, Weber, Du Bois), and Key Subfields (stratification, race & ethnicity, gender, urban, medical, education, political sociology). The structure illustrates the breadth of sociological inquiry.
